body.raw:
{
  "resourceType": "SearchParameter",
  "id": "imagingstudy-series-manufacturer",
  "url": "https://research.balgrist.ch/SearchParameter/imagingstudy-series-manufacturer",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "name": "manufacturer",
  "status": "active",
  "description": "Search by series manufacturer in ImagingStudy",
  "code": "manufacturer",
  "base": ["ImagingStudy"],
  "type": "string",
  "expression": "ImagingStudy.series.extension('http://example.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/dicom-equipment-manufacturer').value.value",
  "xpathUsage": "normal",
  "multipleOr": true,
  "multipleAnd": true,
  "modifier": ["exact", "contains"]
}
